rationale: No Staff-specific embedded/firmware breakdown found this round (Nvidia and Meta embedded-title pages are blended-level, topping out around $454K, below what a true Staff/IC5-6 embedded role at Meta typically commands). The current dataset total (base 243K + bonus 55K + equity 278K ≈ $576K) is plausible but unconfirmed at the Staff-specific level — keeping medium rather than upgrading on unverified extrapolation.
